targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM app_user

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id)::bigint AS value FROM app_user u WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM study_session ss WHERE ss.user_id = u.id AND ss.started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM recommendation_run rr WHERE rr.user_id = u.id AND rr.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM app_user WHERE role = 'researcher'
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM study_session
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM recommendation_candidate
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM recommendation_run
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM recommendation_run WHERE status = 'completed'
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM recommendation_run WHERE status IN ('failed', 'failed_schema_validation', 'cost_limit_exceeded')
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'completed') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS value FROM recommendation_run
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM recommendation_feedback
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE decision = 'approved') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS value FROM recommendation_feedback

panels.title: Feedback Rate
panels.description: Share of completed runs with at least one evaluation

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT rf.run_id) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT rr.id), 0), 1) AS value FROM recommendation_run rr LEFT JOIN recommendation_feedback rf ON rf.run_id = rr.id WHERE rr.status = 'completed'
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM recommendation_feedback WHERE decision IN ('approved', 'save') OR usefulness_score >= 4
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM recommendation_feedback WHERE decision IN ('rejected', 'needs_revision') OR usefulness_score <= 2
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE would_use_in_real_paper = 'yes') / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE would_use_in_real_paper IS NOT NULL), 0), 1) AS value FROM recommendation_feedback
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM source_document
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM document_embedding
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(estimated_cost_usd), 0)::numeric, 4) AS value FROM llm_usage

SELECT ROUND(AVG(rec_count)::numeric, 1) AS value FROM (SELECT rr.id, COUNT(rc.id) AS rec_count FROM recommendation_run rr LEFT JOIN recommendation_candidate rc ON rc.run_id = rr.id WHERE rr.status = 'completed' GROUP BY rr.id) sub
SELECT ROUND(AVG(jsonb_array_length(payload->'document_ids'))::numeric, 1) AS value FROM recommendation_run_event WHERE event_type = 'papers_retrieved' AND payload->'document_ids' IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (finished_at - started_at)))::numeric, 0) AS value FROM recommendation_run WHERE finished_at IS NOT NULL AND started_at IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM session_consent WHERE accepted = true
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM session_final_survey
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN would_use_again THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value FROM session_final_survey WHERE would_use_again IS NOT NULL

SELECT u.full_name AS "Name", u.email AS "Email", u.role AS "Role", CASE WHEN u.is_active THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS "Active", COUNT(DISTINCT ss.id)::bigint AS "Sessions", COUNT(DISTINCT rr.id)::bigint AS "Runs", COUNT(DISTINCT rf.id)::bigint AS "Evaluations", TO_CHAR(GREATEST(last_login.last_login_at, last_run.last_run_at, last_session.last_session_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "Last Activity", TO_CHAR(last_login.last_login_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "Last Login" FROM app_user u LEFT JOIN study_session ss ON ss.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN recommendation_run rr ON rr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN recommendation_feedback rf ON rf.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT MAX(a.consumed_at) AS last_login_at FROM auth_otp_challenge a WHERE a.phone_number = u.phone_number AND a.purpose = 'login' AND a.consumed_at IS NOT NULL) last_login ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT MAX(rr2.created_at) AS last_run_at FROM recommendation_run rr2 WHERE rr2.user_id = u.id) last_run ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT MAX(ss2.started_at) AS last_session_at FROM study_session ss2 WHERE ss2.user_id = u.id) last_session ON TRUE GROUP BY u.id, u.full_name, u.email, u.role, u.is_active, last_login.last_login_at, last_run.last_run_at, last_session.last_session_at ORDER BY GREATEST(last_login.last_login_at, last_run.last_run_at, last_session.last_session_at) DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT COALESCE(urp.research_area, 'Unknown') AS "Research Area", COUNT(DISTINCT urp.user_id)::bigint AS "Users", COUNT(DISTINCT rr.id)::bigint AS "Runs" FROM user_research_profile urp LEFT JOIN recommendation_run rr ON rr.user_id = urp.user_id GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY "Users" DESC
SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1w') AS time, COUNT(*)::double precision AS new_users FROM app_user WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroup(started_at, '1d') AS time, COUNT(*)::double precision AS sessions FROM study_session WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1d') AS time, COUNT(*)::double precision AS recommendations FROM recommendation_candidate WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1d') AS time, status AS metric, COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM recommendation_run WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2
SELECT mode, COUNT(*)::bigint AS count FROM recommendation_run GROUP BY mode ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COALESCE(experiment_variant, 'none') AS variant, COUNT(*)::bigint AS count FROM recommendation_run GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT status, COUNT(*)::bigint AS count FROM recommendation_candidate GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT $__timeGroup(finished_at, '1d') AS time, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (finished_at - started_at)))::numeric, 0)::double precision AS avg_duration_sec FROM recommendation_run WHERE finished_at IS NOT NULL AND started_at IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(finished_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT u.full_name AS "Name", u.email AS "Email", COUNT(rr.id)::bigint AS "Runs", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rr.status = 'completed')::bigint AS "Completed", COUNT(DISTINCT rc.id)::bigint AS "Recommendations", ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(lu.estimated_cost_usd), 0)::numeric, 4) AS "LLM Cost USD" FROM app_user u JOIN recommendation_run rr ON rr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN recommendation_candidate rc ON rc.run_id = rr.id LEFT JOIN llm_usage lu ON lu.run_id = rr.id GROUP BY u.id, u.full_name, u.email ORDER BY "Runs" DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT TO_CHAR(rr.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "Created", COALESCE(u.full_name, 'anonymous') AS "User", rr.mode AS "Mode", rr.status AS "Status", COUNT(DISTINCT rc.id)::bigint AS "Recs", ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(lu.estimated_cost_usd), 0)::numeric, 4) AS "Cost USD" FROM recommendation_run rr LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = rr.user_id LEFT JOIN recommendation_candidate rc ON rc.run_id = rr.id LEFT JOIN llm_usage lu ON lu.run_id = rr.id GROUP BY rr.id, rr.created_at, u.full_name, rr.mode, rr.status ORDER BY rr.created_at DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT ROUND(AVG(relevance_score)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM recommendation_feedback WHERE relevance_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(AVG(originality_score)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM recommendation_feedback WHERE originality_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(AVG(clarity_score)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM recommendation_feedback WHERE clarity_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(AVG(feasibility_score)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM recommendation_feedback WHERE feasibility_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(AVG(trust_score)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM recommendation_feedback WHERE trust_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(AVG(expectation_alignment_score)::numeric, 3) AS value FROM recommendation_feedback WHERE expectation_alignment_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(AVG(usefulness_score)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM recommendation_feedback WHERE usefulness_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(AVG(expectation_met_score)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM session_final_survey WHERE expectation_met_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN would_recommend THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value FROM session_final_survey WHERE would_recommend IS NOT NULL
SELECT COALESCE(decision, 'unknown') AS decision, COUNT(*)::bigint AS count FROM recommendation_feedback GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COALESCE(would_use_in_real_paper, 'unknown') AS answer, COUNT(*)::bigint AS count FROM recommendation_feedback GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT usefulness_score::text AS score, COUNT(*)::bigint AS count FROM recommendation_feedback WHERE usefulness_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY usefulness_score ORDER BY usefulness_score

SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1w') AS time, COUNT(*)::double precision AS evaluations, ROUND(AVG(usefulness_score)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS avg_usefulness FROM recommendation_feedback WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT LEFT(rc.title, 70) AS "Title", COUNT(rf.id)::bigint AS "Evaluations", ROUND(AVG(rf.usefulness_score)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Usefulness", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rf.decision = 'approved')::bigint AS "Approved", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rf.decision = 'rejected')::bigint AS "Rejected" FROM recommendation_candidate rc JOIN recommendation_feedback rf ON rf.recommendation_id = rc.id GROUP BY rc.id, rc.title ORDER BY "Evaluations" DESC, "Avg Usefulness" DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COALESCE(decision, 'unknown') AS "Decision", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Count", ROUND(AVG(relevance_score)::numeric, 2) AS "Relevance", ROUND(AVG(originality_score)::numeric, 2) AS "Originality", ROUND(AVG(clarity_score)::numeric, 2) AS "Clarity", ROUND(AVG(feasibility_score)::numeric, 2) AS "Feasibility", ROUND(AVG(trust_score)::numeric, 2) AS "Trust", ROUND(AVG(usefulness_score)::numeric, 2) AS "Usefulness", ROUND(AVG(expectation_alignment_score)::numeric, 3) AS "EAS" FROM recommendation_feedback GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY "Count" DESC

SELECT COALESCE(rr.experiment_variant, 'none') AS "Variant", COUNT(rf.id)::bigint AS "Evaluations", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rf.decision = 'approved') / NULLIF(COUNT(rf.id), 0), 1) AS "Approval %", ROUND(AVG(rf.usefulness_score)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Usefulness", ROUND(AVG(rf.expectation_alignment_score)::numeric, 3) AS "Avg EAS" FROM recommendation_feedback rf JOIN recommendation_run rr ON rr.id = rf.run_id GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY "Evaluations" DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT doc_id)::bigint AS value FROM recommendation_run_event e, LATERAL jsonb_array_elements_text(e.payload->'document_ids') AS doc_id WHERE e.event_type = 'papers_retrieved'
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM source_document sd WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM document_embedding de WHERE de.document_id = sd.id)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(citation_count)::numeric, 0) AS value FROM source_document WHERE citation_count > 0
SELECT ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(evidence_papers), 0))::numeric, 1) AS value FROM recommendation_candidate
SELECT STRING_AGG(DISTINCT embedding_model, ', ') AS value FROM document_embedding
SELECT source, COUNT(*)::bigint AS count FROM source_document GROUP BY source ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT year::text AS year, COUNT(*)::bigint AS count FROM source_document WHERE year IS NOT NULL GROUP BY year ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1d') AS time, SUM(jsonb_array_length(payload->'document_ids'))::double precision AS papers FROM recommendation_run_event WHERE event_type = 'papers_retrieved' AND payload->'document_ids' IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1d') AS time, COUNT(*)::double precision AS embeddings FROM document_embedding WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1d') AS time, COUNT(*)::double precision AS articles FROM source_document WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT LEFT(title, 90) AS "Title", year AS "Year", citation_count AS "Citations", source AS "Source", LEFT(COALESCE(venue, ''), 40) AS "Venue", LEFT(COALESCE(doi, ''), 36) AS "DOI" FROM source_document ORDER BY citation_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 30

panels.title: Most Retrieved Papers in Runs
panels.description: Articles fetched most often across recommendation runs

targets.rawSql: SELECT LEFT(sd.title, 60) AS "Title", sd.year AS "Year", sd.citation_count AS "Citations", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Retrievals" FROM recommendation_run_event e CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements_text(e.payload->'document_ids') AS doc_id JOIN source_document sd ON sd.id::text = doc_id WHERE e.event_type = 'papers_retrieved' GROUP BY sd.id, sd.title, sd.year, sd.citation_count ORDER BY "Retrievals" DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0)::bigint AS value FROM llm_usage
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM llm_usage
SELECT ROUND(AVG(run_cost)::numeric, 4) AS value FROM (SELECT run_id, SUM(estimated_cost_usd) AS run_cost FROM llm_usage WHERE run_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY run_id) sub
SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1d') AS time, SUM(estimated_cost_usd)::double precision AS cost_usd FROM llm_usage WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1d') AS time, SUM(total_tokens)::double precision AS tokens FROM llm_usage WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT provider AS "Provider", model AS "Model", operation AS "Operation", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Calls", SUM(input_tokens)::bigint AS "Input Tokens", SUM(output_tokens)::bigint AS "Output Tokens", SUM(total_tokens)::bigint AS "Total Tokens", ROUND(SUM(estimated_cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS "Cost USD" FROM llm_usage GROUP BY provider, model, operation ORDER BY "Cost USD" DESC, "Calls" DESC
